theme_archetype: The Performance Pro / Industrial Control Room

rules: No Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans. Avoid typical SaaS AI slop fonts.
Headings must use tight tracking and heavy weights.
Data labels must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing.
Use mono fonts for all numbers, SKUs, inventory counts, and currency to ensure tabular alignment.
Tinted Grey Rule: All greys must stem from a slight neutral/cool tint.
Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for normal text. Volt green primary accent must have black text on top.
Alert chips and severity indicators must use high-saturation warning/alert colors on dark elevated backgrounds.

surfaces: Grid Borders (Technical Look): Expose the skeleton for tables and data grids. Use border-collapse and subtle borders on right and bottom of cells.
Crystal Glass: Used ONLY for sticky headers/nav. Must be backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80 border-b border-white/10. No fully transparent backgrounds under content.
No generic soft shadows. Use sharp 1px borders to define hierarchy, or a glowing drop-shadow for active states.
textures: Subtle SVG noise filter or grain overlay across the app background at 2% opacity to remove digital flatness.
micro_themes: Tracing Beam: Use for active AI Supervisor alerts (a shimmering volt green border around the alert card).

layouts.global: Full viewport height layout (100vh). No scrolling on the main wrapper; scrolling should happen inside independent data panes.
layouts.navigation: Left-side collapsed vertical rail for Super Admin with expanded command palette (CMD+K).

grids.dashboard_bento: High Density Grid. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 lg:grid-rows-4. Gap: tight (gap-4). Use h-full to stretch children.
grids.warehouse_visual_tree: Subgrid layout. Side panel col-span-2 for hierarchy tree, main stage col-span-4 for rack heatmap.

layouts.spacing: Dense but precise. p-4 or p-6 inside widget containers. gap-1 or gap-2 for grouped data points.

motion.transitions: Target specific properties only. E.g., transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. NEVER use transition-all.
motion.micro_animations: Hover states on all rows (slight background lighten hover:bg-white/5). Active state scale-down (active:scale-[0.98]).
motion.staggered_reveals: List items and bento cards should fade in and slide up sequentially using framer-motion staggerChildren.

accessibility.contrast: Strict adherence to APCA contrast standards. Dark theme requires stark white text for primary data.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='setup-wizard-next-button', data-testid='ai-alert-dismiss').
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#D4FF00] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-[#0A0A0A].

component_rules.frameworks: Use Shadcn UI for forms, dialogs, dropdowns, tables.
component_rules.customizations: Strip default Vercel border-radius. Use rounded-none or max rounded-sm (4px). Make components data-dense (reduce default Shadcn padding on table cells).
component_rules.cards: Avoid default cards for everything. Use raw flat geometric panes separated by borders.
component_rules.charts: Recharts (wrapped in Shadcn). Must match dark theme palette. Line charts should use Volt Green (#D4FF00) with a subtle gradient fill.

customer_ordering_app.theme: Light theme, warm-industrial (Paper/Bone White bg, Dark Slate text).
customer_ordering_app.layout: Marketplace-lite. Wide max-w-7xl centered container. Bento grid for bulk quick-add.
customer_ordering_app.components: Larger tap targets, sticky cart summary footer on mobile.

delivery_partner_app.theme: High-contrast dark mode. Essential for outdoor sunlight legibility.
delivery_partner_app.layout: Mobile-first minimal. Massive typography for route stops. Swipe-to-confirm gestures.
delivery_partner_app.features: Offline sync indicator, full-screen map overlay, highly visible scan QR action.

image_urls.description: Modern warehouse boxes. Use as muted, dark-overlay background during the First-Launch Setup Wizard.
Spacious indoor warehouse. Good for Super Admin login screen background.
Abstract data network (orange lines). Use as a subtle cropped graphic element inside the 'AI Supervisor' alerts pane.
Black delivery truck. Use in the Delivery Partner App onboarding or dashboard empty state.

media.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - strict 'duotone' or 'bold' weight for industrial feel.

3d_libraries.recommendation: D3.js or Visx for the Warehouse Management visual tree. Data precision is more important than 3D rotation. Do NOT use heavy 3D like Three.js unless specifically building a 3D digital twin.
3d_libraries.usage: Use Visx for heatmaps (inventory turnover rate per rack).

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind with provided colors and custom fonts (Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono).
Install necessary packages: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge @radix-ui/react-slot sonner
Create the First-launch Setup Wizard as the default landing route if no data exists.
Implement a Command Palette (CMD+K) using Shadcn's Command component for quick jumping to SKUs/Customers.
Build the dashboard using a CSS Grid layout, omitting typical 'Cards' and instead using border-collapse style separated panes.
Ensure the AI Supervisor pane has a distinct visual treatment (tracing beam or subtle orange network texture).
For all UI files, use .js extension (e.g., .jsx or standard React JS configuration). DO NOT generate .tsx files.
Add data-testid to every single button, link, and input.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid AI slop aesthetic: make creative, distinctive frontends.
Do not use transparent backgrounds in headers or dropdowns that have content flowing underneath them.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Never apply transition: all. Always specify transition properties.
DO NOT center align the app container. No .App { text-align: center; }.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, active states, focus rings.
Do not use emoji characters for icons.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (kebab-case).
